title: Crazy Craft 5.0 (Chaos Edition)
description: A Unofficial continuation of Crazy Craft with updated mods and less drama
body:
![An Rainbow colorized text that says Crazy Craft](https://i.imgur.com/10RtkMJ.png) ##
5.0 Chaos Edition
[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/crazy-craft-chaos-edition) The pack is meant to give the old feelings of Crazy Craft while updating it to newer versions. Stuff like [Chaos Awakens](https://modrinth.com/mod/chaos-awakens) and [Marvel Superheroes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/marvel-superheroes) are added to give that feeling of being over power and super while mods like [Dungeons Enhanced](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-enhanced), [castle-dungeons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/castle-dungeons) and [Aquamirae](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquamirae) are added to give that adventurous feeling. ## About This Modpack This Crazy Craft modpack is designed to make your minecraft experience hectic and a struggle. There are many dungeons base mods and weapon mods that give you the adventuring experience, while mods like [Chaos Awakens](https://modrinth.com/mod/chaos-awakens) give that struggling of an unknown world experience. [![BisectHosting banner with Minecraft blocks, promo code 'Glips' for 25% off game server hosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/0b60bca3-af55-4aee-a033-f951a69d5054.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/Glips) ## Features in the Modpack - Hectic feeling non-stop - Slight RPG style hud - Bosses on top of bosses on top of bosses! - Dangerous locations and mobs - Customizable tools and more - Many Blocks to allow you to make the best of locations!
Modpack FAQ: Click Here To View Can I make content on this pack? Yes you can but crediting is greatly appreciate it! Where is godzilla and other bosses? Due to Chaos Awakens not being fully finished/updated I can only say they will come "soon" Permission to take the modpack and make my own version? If you do please shot me a ping on Discord and we can discuss if you have my permission or not
